overall.description: First-person game footage showing a character holding a wooden bat walking along a dirt path at night. The scene transitions from near a wooden structure to an open rural trail with a stone wall visible on the right, illuminated by a flashlight in dark conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path near wooden structure

events.description: character begins walking away from wooden structure holding a bat
hand holding wooden bat moves out of camera view

agents.ego_description: walking away from a wooden structure while holding a wooden bat in left hand

entered.detail: thick vertical wooden post of a rural structure
unpaved dirt trail illuminated by flashlight
tall grass on sides of the trail
dark silhouette of trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view holding a wooden bat, standing next to a wooden post at night. The character walks forward along an illuminated dirt path surrounded by grass fields, moving away from the structure toward distant trees on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural trail with stone wall

events.description: stone wall becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the dirt path with the bat no longer visible in frame

entered.detail: low stone or concrete wall running parallel to the path on the right

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the dark dirt path with the wooden bat no longer in view. A stone wall emerges on the right side and gradually approaches as the camera moves forward, while the distant trees shift to the left side of the frame. The surroundings remain dark and empty with only the path illuminated.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark rural path that shifts from a structured starting point to an open, desolate trail. It begins beside a wooden post with a wooden bat held in view, moving forward along an illuminated dirt path that cuts through expansive grass fields toward distant trees. As the character advances, the bat disappears from the frame and the perspective pushes deeper into the night. The scene then shifts as a stone wall emerges and draws closer on the right side, while the distant trees gradually drift toward the left of the frame. Finally, the camera continues its steady progression through the empty darkness, guided only by the light on the narrow path.
